title: Be Polite
description: Challenge-based Pacifist Nerd Mod that kills you for bad things🤓
body:
The mod forces you to follow basic rules of conduct and behave well.


Don't:

- kill peaceful animals
- Running Too Fast
- Wear combat gear
- Storage of items that may cause harm
- Eating junk food and animal food
- Play late at night
- Get up on the snow without clothes 

Also, every morning mother will send you a handout in the form of healthy food or good things
